title: [RELEASED] Hours field supported for Date columns changes

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

Excited to announce that after much anticipation, changes made to the Hours field of a Date column will now be able to initiate our native “When a Column Changes,” “When any column changes,” “Every day if date has passed,” and “When Date is Set” trigger blocks.

This feature has been highly requested for a while. Now, whenever a user makes a change to the time configuration within one of their Date columns, this will initiate these trigger blocks to run.

Here is an example of such a change:

Try it out and as always, give us any and all of your feedback. ﻿We want to know what you think!
